headline: Tim Cook’s Apple Legacy Starts With the Stock, and Goes Way Beyond. The Story the Numbers Tell.
summary: Apple stock soared 1,932% during Tim Cook’s nearly 15 years as CEO. He expanded the company and pushed it to new highs.

headline: Apple CEO Transition Signals Stability, AI Remains Key Challenge
summary: AAPL names John Ternus as CEO from September 2026 as Tim Cook becomes executive chairman, spotlighting AI execution and hardware continuity.
